Class ConstantEvaluator.EvaluationResult

java.lang.Object
recoder.service.ConstantEvaluator.EvaluationResult
Enclosing interface:
ConstantEvaluator
public static final class ConstantEvaluator.EvaluationResult extends Object
Carrier for intermediate evaluation results. Explicit replacement for a familiy of polymorphic types, helps to prevent expensive object allocations.
